commands.review_summary:
The branch removes downloads from search/recommended ranking, renames recommended rank indexes to installs-based keys, adds per-user/skill/root/day install telemetry dedupe with a pruning cron, and updates tests/docs/specs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature/ranking policy PR rather than a bug report. Source inspection of the PR head shows the changed ranking and dedupe paths.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because this is a member-authored, stacked schema/ranking policy PR with no narrow automated repair finding.

target.title: Rank skills by installs and dedupe install telemetry
target.body:
## Summary
- switch recommended/search popularity from downloads to all-time installs while keeping stars as the first tie-breaker
- add install telemetry dedupe by user, skill, root, and UTC day, plus daily dedupe pruning
- update docs/specs and regression tests for install-based ranking and stale recommended cursors

## Verification
- bunx vitest run convex/search.test.ts convex/skills.listPublicPageV4.test.ts convex/skills.publicListCursor.test.ts convex/telemetry.test.ts convex/crons.test.ts convex/lib/publisherAbuseScoring.test.ts convex/publisherAbuse.test.ts
- bunx tsc --noEmit --pretty false
- bunx tsc -p packages/schema/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
- bunx tsc -p packages/clawhub/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false
- bunx convex codegen
- VITE_CONVEX_URL=https://example.invalid bun run ci:types-build
- NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 bun run ci:packages
- git diff --check
- AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0 .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --output /tmp/clawhub-install-telemetry-autoreview-final.txt
- bunx convex dev --once --typecheck=disable
- curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:3000/
- bunx convex run skills:listPublicPageV4 '{"numItems":3,"sort":"recommended"}'
- timeout 10 bunx convex logs --history 20

## Local toolchain notes
- bun run ci:static reached peer check, audit, format, and lint cleanly, then failed in knip/oxc-parser with ERR_REQUIRE_ESM on Node 20.16.0.
- bun run ci:unit ran 1,497 tests successfully before Vitest worker startup hit the local html-encoding-sniffer/@exodus/bytes ERR_REQUIRE_ESM issue, causing coverage undercount failure.
- Vite warned that Node 20.16.0 is below its recommended 20.19+ during the successful production build.
target.author: jesse-merhi
